APPROVE
Implementation cleanly addresses all five acceptance criteria. Timeout evidence capture is well-structured, the progress classification is sensible (sandbox-state takes precedence over stream output), and the fixture-based tests deterministically exercise each branch including the missing-sandbox edge case. README updates appropriately document the new artifacts.
